creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tobik
Date: Sun Jan 27 13:31:27 UTC 2019
New revision: 491348
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/491348

Log:
  New port: x11/wl-clipboard

  This project implements two command-line Wayland clipboard utilities
  wl-copy and wl-paste that let you easily copy data between the
  clipboard and Unix pipes, sockets, files and so on.

  WWW: https://github.com/bugaevc/wl-clipboard

  PR:		235244
  Submitted by:	greg@unrelenting.technology

Changes:

  head/x11/wl-clipboard/
  head/x11/wl-clipboard/Makefile
  head/x11/wl-clipboard/distinfo
  head/x11/wl-clipboard/pkg-descr
